name: mọnamọna Atọka
description: Atọka nọmba ẹyọkan ni iyara ti iduroṣinṣin hemodynamic. Iṣiro bi HR / SBP. Deede jẹ 0.5-0.7.
instructions: Pin oṣuwọn ọkan nipasẹ titẹ ẹjẹ systolic. Atọka mọnamọna ti nyara tọkasi ibajẹ.

scoring.label: Ibanujẹ iwọntunwọnsi - Wiwọle IV, awọn omi-omi
Ibalẹ nla -- isọdọtun lẹsẹkẹsẹ, awọn ọja ẹjẹ

obstetric.note: Atọka Shock Obstetric (OSI) nlo agbekalẹ kanna. SI> 0.9 ninu awọn alaisan aboyun jẹ pataki. HR deede ga julọ ni oyun (80-100 bpm).
